name: Folie à Deux
ability: 2 Outsiders are Evil, learn each other, and may lose their abilities.

name: La Révolution
ability: If evil wins, all players make a hand signal. If most match & the Demon's doesn't, good wins instead.

name: Hemomagus
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Chosen Minions swap characters with you if an Outsider lives, who then dies.
